mapper.sql: SELECT c.*, u1.full_name AS p1_name, u2.full_name AS p2_name FROM conversations c JOIN users u1 ON c.participant_one = u1.id JOIN users u2 ON c.participant_two = u2.id
mapper.select: WHERE c.participant_one = #{userId} OR c.participant_two = #{userId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.last_message_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, c.last_message_at DESC
WHERE ((c.participant_one = #{p1} AND c.participant_two = #{p2}) OR (c.participant_one = #{p2} AND c.participant_two = #{p1})) AND c.order_id = #{orderId} AND c.order_id IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversations (participant_one, participant_two, order_id) VALUES (#{participantOne}, #{participantTwo}, #{orderId})
mapper.update: UPDATE conversations SET last_message_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
